---
title: "Otto Franke"
---

## Otto Franke

**Dates:** (1842-  )

### Description

German writer

### Biography

Perhaps the Mr Franke who wanted to translate one of CMYs novels

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 20th [1868]
- Letter from Oct 12th 1867
- Letter from Jan 14th 1867
- Letter from Novr 19th 1866

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
